TAGLINE: A comfy refuge for students, workers, and friends
ABOUT_TEXT: A small, family-owned café tucked inside the busy but happy streets of BF Resort Village, Las Piñas. Named after founder Angela's five children, Café Singko opened during the pandemic and has become a neighborhood staple — minimalist interiors, espresso drinks, sandwiches, pasta, and pastries. Now partners with Twenty Four Bakeshop for baked goods.
MENU_ITEM_1_DESC: Best-seller espresso drink — rich, milky, and perfectly balanced
MENU_ITEM_2_DESC: Signature house drink — sweet-salty cream over coffee, a Café Singko original
MENU_ITEM_3_DESC: Best-selling all-day snack — soft egg, toasted bread, a crowd favorite
MENU_ITEM_4_DESC: Indulgent chocolate drink — rich and dessert-worthy
TESTIMONIAL_1_QUOTE: Cafe Singko is such a gem! Great coffee, good food, and a nice spot to get some work done.
ADDRESS: Unit L, MJ Square Building, BF Resort Drive, BF Resort Village, Las Piñas
SEO_TITLE: Café Singko | Cafe in Las Piñas
SEO_DESCRIPTION: Café Singko is a family-owned coffee shop on BF Resort Drive, Las Piñas — espresso drinks, egg drop sandwiches, and pastries in a bright, cozy space.
